metadata.name: Production Smoke Tests
metadata.purpose: Comprehensive post-deployment validation suite that verifies critical functionality, availability, and performance of production systems at ectropy.ai
metadata.author: Claude (Enterprise Integration)

executiveSummary.description: Production smoke test suite that validates critical functionality immediately after deployment to ectropy.ai. Verifies main site availability, API health endpoints, SSL/TLS certificates, response times, HTTP redirects, and API subdomain configuration.
keyChanges: API health endpoint validation with response parsing
prerequisites: curl and openssl available on test machine

impact.rollbackTime: N/A - validation does not modify state

preFlightChecks.name: cURL Installation
preFlightChecks.description: Verify curl is installed and available for HTTP testing
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Command exits with 0 and returns version

onFailure.message: curl is not installed - required for smoke tests

preFlightChecks.name: OpenSSL Installation
preFlightChecks.description: Verify openssl is installed for SSL/TLS certificate validation
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Command exits with 0 and returns version

onFailure.message: openssl not available - SSL certificate test will be skipped

preFlightChecks.name: DNS Resolution
preFlightChecks.description: Verify ectropy.ai domain resolves to valid IP

onFailure.message: ectropy.ai domain does not resolve - check DNS configuration

preFlightChecks.name: Network Connectivity
preFlightChecks.description: Verify network connectivity to production server

onFailure.message: Cannot reach ectropy.ai - check network connectivity

phases.name: Main Site Availability
phases.description: Verify main production site is accessible via HTTPS

steps.name: Test Main Site HTTPS
steps.purpose: Verify main site returns successful HTTPS response

validation.criteria: Exit code 0 indicates successful HTTP 2xx response

onFailure.message: Main site is NOT accessible - deployment failed

steps.name: Verify HTTPS Connection
steps.purpose: Retrieve HTTP headers to verify HTTPS is working

onFailure.message: HTTPS connection failed or returned non-200 status

phases.name: API Health Check
phases.description: Validate API Gateway health endpoint and response

steps.name: Test API Health Endpoint
steps.purpose: Retrieve health check response from API Gateway

onFailure.message: API health check FAILED - API Gateway not responding

steps.name: Parse Health Response
steps.description: Validate health check response contains expected fields
steps.purpose: Verify health response has correct format

onFailure.message: API health response does not contain expected status

steps.name: Test API Subdomain
steps.purpose: Verify dedicated API subdomain is accessible

onFailure.message: API subdomain is not configured or not accessible (this is optional)

phases.name: SSL/TLS Certificate Validation
phases.description: Verify SSL/TLS certificate is valid and properly configured

steps.name: Test SSL Certificate Validity
steps.command: echo | openssl s_client -connect ectropy.ai:443 -servername ectropy.ai 2>/dev/null | grep 'Verify return code: 0'
steps.purpose: Verify SSL certificate is trusted and not expired

onFailure.message: SSL certificate validation failed (might be self-signed or not configured)

steps.name: Check Certificate Expiration
steps.command: echo | openssl s_client -connect ectropy.ai:443 -servername ectropy.ai 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -dates

onFailure.message: Could not retrieve certificate expiration dates

phases.name: Performance Validation
phases.description: Verify response times meet performance thresholds

steps.name: Measure Response Time
steps.purpose: Measure total time for HTTPS request

onFailure.message: Response time exceeds 3s threshold - performance may be degraded

steps.name: Measure API Response Time
steps.purpose: Measure API health endpoint response time

onFailure.message: API response time exceeds 2s threshold - performance may be degraded

phases.name: HTTP to HTTPS Redirect
phases.description: Verify HTTP requests are redirected to HTTPS

steps.name: Test HTTP Redirect
steps.purpose: Verify HTTP returns 301/302 redirect to HTTPS

onFailure.message: HTTP to HTTPS redirect not configured - security best practice

steps.name: Verify Redirect Location
steps.purpose: Verify redirect points to HTTPS URL

onFailure.message: Could not verify HTTPS redirect location

smokeTests.test: API health endpoint returns valid status

smokeTests.expectedBehavior: Certificate is trusted and not expired

triggerConditions: API health endpoint fails to respond
All smoke tests fail indicating complete deployment failure
Critical security issue detected (invalid SSL certificate, no HTTPS)
rollback.decisionMaker: DevOps Lead or Site Reliability Engineer

steps.name: Stop new traffic to failed deployment
steps.command: # Update load balancer or reverse proxy to stop routing
steps.purpose: Prevent users from accessing failed deployment

steps.name: Switch to previous deployment
steps.command: # Execute blue-green deployment rollback or redeploy previous version
steps.purpose: Restore service with last known good deployment

steps.name: Verify rollback success
steps.purpose: Run smoke tests against rolled-back deployment

steps.name: Update deployment status
steps.command: # Update status in deployment tracking system

steps.name: Investigate failure
steps.command: # Collect logs and error messages from failed deployment
steps.purpose: Determine root cause for future fix

verification.successCriteria: All smoke tests pass after rollback

alertThresholds.condition: API health check returns non-200 status
alertThresholds.escalation: After 5 minutes, escalate to DevOps Lead

alertThresholds.action: Trigger automated rollback if error rate > 5%
alertThresholds.escalation: Notify DevOps Lead and Product Manager

alertThresholds.action: Create incident ticket for performance investigation

successCriteria.criterion: API health endpoint returns valid status

supportedQueries.query: What smoke tests are run after production deployment?
supportedQueries.returns: Main site availability, API health check, API subdomain, SSL certificate validation, response time testing, HTTP to HTTPS redirect

supportedQueries.query: What are the critical smoke tests that must pass?
supportedQueries.returns: Main site HTTPS accessibility (P0) and API health endpoint validation (P0)

supportedQueries.query: What response time thresholds are validated?
How long do production smoke tests take?
What happens if smoke tests fail?
supportedQueries.returns: Rollback procedures are triggered based on severity - critical failures initiate immediate rollback

supportedQueries.query: How do I run production smoke tests manually?
What monitoring is recommended after deployment?
supportedQueries.returns: 24 hours of enhanced monitoring for 5xx errors, response times, SSL certificates, and service uptime

decisionSupport: Validates deployment success before declaring production ready
Identifies critical failures that require immediate rollback
Provides objective success criteria for go/no-go decisions
Enables automated validation in CI/CD pipelines

architectureAlignment.routingConfig: Validates NGINX reverse proxy configuration and routing
architectureAlignment.portAllocation: Tests production HTTPS (443) and HTTP (80) accessibility
architectureAlignment.oauthConfig: Indirectly validates API Gateway OAuth infrastructure via health endpoint

knownIssues.title: First request after cold start may be slow
knownIssues.impact: Initial smoke test response time may exceed threshold
knownIssues.mitigation: Retry smoke tests or warm up application before validation
knownIssues.action: Acceptable to retry if first attempt shows slow response

knownIssues.title: Self-signed certificates fail SSL validation
knownIssues.impact: SSL certificate test will fail in non-production environments
knownIssues.mitigation: SSL test is marked as optional/recommended, not required
knownIssues.action: Use proper CA-signed certificates in production

knownIssues.title: API subdomain may not be configured initially
knownIssues.impact: API subdomain test will fail if DNS not configured
knownIssues.mitigation: API subdomain test is optional and failure does not block deployment
knownIssues.action: Configure api.ectropy.ai DNS when scaling requirements justify it

knownIssues.title: Network latency affects response time tests
knownIssues.impact: Response time thresholds may be exceeded due to network conditions
knownIssues.mitigation: Run smoke tests from server in same region as production
knownIssues.action: Consider adjusting thresholds based on deployment region

required.name: PROD_URL
required.description: Production URL to test (defaults to https://ectropy.ai)
